title: lotononis excisa
intro: Lotononis excisa is a plant species native to southern Africa, commonly known as the 'bitterbush' or 'lotononis'. The medicinal properties of lotononis excisa have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as prevent the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms. Herbal preparations of lotononis excisa can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used to treat a range of health conditions in southern African cultures.
